parameters.query:
INSERT INTO `FNT_finanto`.`funil_fgts` (`datetime`, `datetime_last`, `IDUsuarioWPP`, `site`, `pagina`,`url_completa`, `utm_source`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_term`, `utm_content`, `utm_medium`, `ttclid`, `ttp`, `fbp`, `fbc`, `event_id`, `ip`, `user_agent`, `phone`, `email`, `etapa`, `fbclid`, `gclid`, `_ga`, `etapa_manychat`, `fgtsbalance`) VALUES (
    COALESCE('{{ $json?.datetime || $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }}', NOW()),
    '{{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }}',
    '{{ $json?.IDUsuarioWPP }}',
    {{ $json?.site ? `'${$json.site}'` : null }},
    '{{ $('Manychat Get Info').item.json.data.live_chat_url.replaceAll("https://","") }}',
    {{ $json?.url_completa ? `'${$json.url_completa}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.utm_source ? `'${$json.utm_source}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.utm_campaign ? `'${$json.utm_campaign}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.utm_term ? `'${$json.utm_term}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.utm_content ? `'${$json.utm_content}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.utm_medium ? `'${$json.utm_medium}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.ttclid ? `'${$json.ttclid}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.ttp ? `'${$json.ttp}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.fbp ? `'${$json.fbp}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?.fbc ? `'${$json.fbc}'` : null }},
    {{ $json.event_id ? `'${$json.event_id}'` : null }},
    {{ $json.data?.ip ? `'${$json.data.ip}'` : null }},
    {{ $json.user_agent ? `'${$json.user_agent}'` : null }},
    {{ $('Manychat Get Info').item.json.data.whatsapp_phone ? `'${$('Manychat Get Info').item.json.data.whatsapp_phone}'` : null }},
    {{ ($json?.email || $('Evento').item.json?.email) ? 
        "'"+($json?.email || $('Evento').item.json?.email)+"'" : null }},
    {{ $('Evento').item.json.etapa ? `'${$('Evento').item.json.etapa}'` : null }},
    {{ $json.fbclid ? `'${$json.fbclid}'` : null }},
    {{ $json.gclid ? `'${$json.gclid}'` : null }},
    {{ $json?._ga ? `'${$json._ga}'` : null }},
    {{ $('Evento').item.json?.validTag ? `'${$('Evento').item.json?.validTag}'` : null }},
    {{ 
  Math.max(
    ...[
      $('Evento').item.json?.fgtsBalance,
      $json.fgtsbalance,
      20.0
    ]
    .filter(v => v != null)
  )
}}
);


SELECT *, 
    (SELECT `fgtsbalance`  
     FROM `funil_fgts`  
     WHERE `IDUsuarioWPP` = '{{ $json.IDUsuarioWPP }}'  
       AND `site` LIKE '%fgts%'  
       AND MONTH(`datetime_last`) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE())  
       AND YEAR(`datetime_last`) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) 
     ORDER BY `fgtsbalance` DESC 
     LIMIT 1) AS fgtsbalance2 
FROM funil_fgts 
WHERE IDUsuarioWPP = '{{ $json.IDUsuarioWPP }}' 
  AND etapa = '{{ $('Evento').item.json.etapa }}' 
  AND site LIKE '%fgts%' 
ORDER BY datetime_last DESC 
LIMIT 1;

    .filter(v => v != null)

}}
);


SELECT *, 
    (SELECT `fgtsbalance`  
     FROM `funil_fgts`  
     WHERE `IDUsuarioWPP` = '{{ $json.IDUsuarioWPP }}'  
       AND `site` LIKE '%fgts%'  
       AND MONTH(`datetime_last`) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE())  
       AND YEAR(`datetime_last`) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) 
     ORDER BY `fgtsbalance` DESC 
     LIMIT 1) AS fgtsbalance2 
FROM funil_fgts 
WHERE IDUsuarioWPP = '{{ $json.IDUsuarioWPP }}' 
  AND etapa = '{{ $('Evento').item.json.etapa }}' 
  AND site LIKE '%fgts%' 
ORDER BY datetime_last DESC 
LIMIT 1;
